title: Sweet and Creamy Kenyan Yams Stir-fry
description: A festive sweet and creamy dish featuring low-calorie-friendly options for a healthy twist on traditional yam recipes with coriander.

ingredients.name: Sweetener of choice (e.g., honey or stevia drops)
ingredients.amount: 1-2 teaspoons, depending on desired sweetness level

instructions: Quarter the yams and toss with a drizzle of olive oil, salt, and pepper. Roast in the preheated oven for about 45 minutes or until tender.
In a mixing bowl, combine the roasted yam, Greek yogurt, skim milk, coriander, sweetener, and seasonings. Mix thoroughly to blend all ingredients evenly.
Spoon the mixture into individual serving bowls and garnish with additional fresh cilantro if desired.
